hero.title: Ibrahim Mohamed Shoeib
hero.headline: Building scalable SaaS & ERP systems
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer with strong backend expertise in NestJS, Node.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and scalable SaaS/ERP systems. Experienced in building production-ready applications with modern frontend technologies including React.js and Next.js.

about.title: Engineering with
about.description: I specialize in building complex, data-heavy applications. My focus is on architecting solutions that scale — whether designing a modular ERP system or optimizing database queries for a high-traffic SaaS platform. I prioritize clean engineering, maintainability, and robust performance.

architecture.title: Scalable Architecture
architecture.description: Designing distributed systems and microservices capable of handling high-volume SaaS and ERP traffic.

database.title: Database Engineering
database.description: Optimizing PostgreSQL and Prisma schemas for complex relational data, multi-tenant architectures, and fast analytics.

api.title: Clean API Design
api.description: Building robust REST and GraphQL APIs with strict typing, role-based access control, and comprehensive validation.

frontend.title: Modern Frontend
frontend.description: Crafting premium, performant React interfaces that seamlessly integrate with complex backend state.

skills.title: Technical Expertise
skills.subtitle: A comprehensive overview of my professional stack and specialized engineering capabilities.

projects.title: Engineering Showcase
projects.subtitle: Production-grade systems, scalable architectures, and modular enterprise applications.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.subtitle: A highly decoupled, scalable data flow designed for maximum availability and strict consistency in enterprise environments.

frontend.title: Frontend Layer
frontend.summary: React + TypeScript with modern UI frameworks for responsive, interactive user experiences.
frontend.details: Handles user interactions, form validation, state management, and real-time updates using React Query for server state.

api.title: API Layer
api.summary: RESTful Express.js APIs with JWT authentication and comprehensive middleware for security.
api.details: Implements rate limiting, CORS, input validation with Joi, and structured error handling for reliable client-server communication.

business.title: Business Logic Layer
business.summary: Domain-driven design with service classes handling complex ERP/SaaS business rules.
business.details: Manages multi-tenant data isolation, role-based permissions, workflow automation, and integration with external services.

database.title: Database Layer
database.summary: PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM for type-safe database operations and migrations.
database.details: Optimized queries, database indexing, connection pooling, and backup strategies for high-performance data persistence.

apiDesign.title: API Contracts
apiDesign.subtitle: Clean, RESTful endpoints that serve as the backbone for high-performance frontends and external integrations.

auth-login.title: User Authentication
auth-login.description: Authenticate users with JWT tokens for secure API access.
auth-login.request: JSON body with email and password
auth-login.response: JWT access token and refresh token

products-list.title: List Products
products-list.description: Retrieve paginated list of products with filtering and sorting.
products-list.request: Query params: page, limit, category, search
products-list.response: Array of product objects with metadata

orders-create.title: Create Order
orders-create.description: Process new orders with inventory validation and payment integration.
orders-create.request: JSON body with items, shipping, billing info

users-update.title: Update User Profile
users-update.description: Update user information with role-based access control.
users-update.request: JSON body with updated user fields

systemThinking.title: System Thinking
systemThinking.subtitle: My engineering process for building reliable, scalable, and maintainable SaaS and ERP platforms.

analyze.title: Domain-Driven Discovery
analyze.summary: Analyze business boundaries for Multi-warehouse Inventory Sync and Real-time Stock Reconciliation. Map complex domain workflows to distinct microservice bounded contexts.

design.title: Distributed System Architecture
design.summary: Design high-throughput Distributed Order Processing Pipelines using event-driven communication (Kafka/RabbitMQ) and robust transactional outbox patterns.

build.title: Modular Business Engines
build.summary: Implement isolated services such as Modular Billing & Invoicing and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Systems with fine-grained authorization policies.

optimize.title: Data Layer Optimization
optimize.summary: Scale relational data using intelligent partitioning, read-replicas, and multi-tier caching (Redis) for intense analytical query workloads.

scale.title: Production Resilience
scale.summary: Ensure zero-downtime deployments via CI/CD, backed by comprehensive telemetry, distributed tracing, and automated failover mechanisms.

contact.title: Initiate Connection
contact.subtitle: Discuss architectures, distributed systems, or your next major SaaS project.

footer.tagline: Software Engineer focused on architecting scalable backend systems, robust APIs, and premium user experiences for SaaS platforms.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: Real-world engineering projects building scalable ERP and SaaS systems that handle complex business logic and high-volume data.

erp-system-lead.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer - ERP System
erp-system-lead.description: Led development of a comprehensive ERP system serving 500+ users across manufacturing and logistics operations. Built scalable backend with Node.js/Express, PostgreSQL, and real-time dashboard with React.
achievements: Reduced inventory processing time by 60% through optimized database queries
Implemented real-time inventory tracking with WebSocket connections
Built automated reporting system handling 10k+ daily transactions
challenges: High-volume transaction processing without performance degradation

saas-platform-architect.title: Full-Stack Architect - SaaS Platform
saas-platform-architect.description: Architected and developed a B2B SaaS platform for project management with subscription billing, multi-tenant architecture, and advanced analytics. Handled 1000+ concurrent users.
achievements: Designed microservices architecture scaling to 10k+ users
Implemented subscription billing with automated tier management
Built real-time collaboration features with conflict resolution
challenges: Complex billing logic with prorated subscriptions and add-ons
Data migration from monolithic to microservices architecture

ecommerce-backend-dev.title: Backend Engineer - E-commerce Platform
ecommerce-backend-dev.description: Developed high-performance backend for an e-commerce platform processing $2M+ monthly transactions. Implemented inventory management, payment processing, and order fulfillment systems.
achievements: Built order processing system handling 50k+ daily transactions
Implemented fraud detection reducing chargebacks by 40%
Created inventory forecasting system with 95% accuracy
challenges: High availability requirements with 99.9% uptime SLA
Complex inventory allocation across multiple warehouses
Real-time price optimization based on demand patterns

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we handle your data and respect your privacy.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how I collect, use, and protect your information when you visit my engineering portfolio.

collection.title: Data We Collect
collection.description: I collect non-personal information to understand how visitors interact with my work. This includes:

usage.title: How We Use Data
usage.description: The collected data is used exclusively for:
items: Improving website performance and user experience
Analyzing which projects receive the most interest

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: I use local storage and basic cookies to maintain session continuity (e.g., ensuring you aren't counted twice during a single visit). No third-party tracking cookies are used.

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.description: I do not collect personal identifiers like names, email addresses (unless you use the contact form), or passwords. All analytics data is anonymized.

dashboard.loginSubtitle: Secure access to your engineering control panel
dashboard.authorizedAccess: Authorized access only. Unauthorized entry attempts are logged.
